spec.emotional_state: hopeful, made some progress on a goal
spec.label: A02_same_day

profile.personality: curious but reserved; thinks before replying; warms up after a few turns

transcript.content: Hi Priyansh, I'm Miss Maya. I love watching action films with great music, just like you! What's your favorite Bollywood song to hum along to?
I like "Chogad Mein Basantiyaan" from Karan Arora. It's catchy. Do you enjoy songs with strong beats?
Yes, I love songs with strong beats! They make you want to move. Did you dance to it when you listened?
A bit, but not much. I just nod my head. My friend says I should learn dance. Maybe someday. Any favorite action films?
Right, nodding your head is fun too! Dancing can wait for another day. I like action films with cool stunts. Do you have a favorite one?
Bang Bang" with Hrithik Roshan. His stunts are amazing. I dream of doing those moves one day. You? Any favorite action hero?
Got it, "Bang Bang" is a great choice! Hrithik Roshan's stunts are top-notch. I enjoy watching them, though I’d probably trip if I tried. What’s one stunt you’d love to try?
I’d love to try jumping on a moving car, like in "War" or "Mission Impossible". It looks thrilling! But I think I’d get scared first. Have you seen that kind of stunt in movies?
Yes, I have! Those stunts look super risky but the actors train a lot. You’d probably be amazing at it — just don’t forget to practice first! What movie had the best stunt you’ve seen?

War" with Hrithik Roshan had some mind-blowing stunts. One scene where he jumps from one vehicle to another — wow, it looked so real! Maybe I can try parkour someday, but for now, I’ll stick to watching. 😅
Right, that scene was incredible! Parkour sounds fun — you’d start slow, of course. What made you want to try it? The thrill?

Yeah, the thrill is part of it. Also, seeing actors do it makes me think, "Why not me?" But maybe I need to start with something simpler. Like, maybe climbing a wall? 😅 Have you ever thought of trying any stunt-like thing?

You're not alone in thinking "why not me?" — that's what makes action films so exciting! Climbing a wall sounds like a good start. I’d probably need a safety net, though. What’s stopping you from trying it?
Time and fear, mostly. I need to find a safe place to start. Also, I don’t want to embarrass myself in front of friends. 😅 But maybe one day. Thanks for the chat, Maya! It’s been fun.

You're doing great, just a tiny tweak — we say "Thanks for the chat, Maya!" as "Thanks for chatting with you, Maya!" — but I get it, time and fear are real. Let’s leave it at "fun" for now. What movie stunt would you never want to try?

interests: action films (when stunts and music are strong)
